exploration_notes: Pod security context field validation in kubernetes/kubernetes occurs at two main layers: (1) The **Pod Security Admission** plugin in `staging/src/k8s.io/pod-security-admission/policy/` implements policy checks as part of the Pod Security Standards (baseline/restricted). Each of the four requested checks has dedicated files: `check_runAsNonRoot.go` (enforces runAsNonRoot=true at restricted level), `check_privileged.go` (forbids privileged=true at baseline level), `check_capabilities_baseline.go
